judgment.summary: A high-margin software business with robust free cash flow and an attractive PEG ratio, despite tight liquidity ratios.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 0.97 vs estimate 0.97 (in line); next earnings date 2026-07-22.
positives: PEG ratio 0.88 — suggests attractive valuation relative to growth.
Forward P/E 18.92 vs trailing 56.59 — implies significant expected earnings expansion.
Gross margin 76.6% — reflects high-quality, scalable revenue.
Free cash flow (TTM) $5.11B — demonstrates strong cash generation.
Total cash $5.18B vs total debt $2.43B — represents a healthy net cash position.
negatives: Current ratio 0.84 — indicates potential short-term liquidity constraints.
Quick ratio 0.69 — suggests limited immediate liquidity.
Earnings growth 2.3% — shows significant deceleration compared to 22.1% revenue growth.

news.paragraph: Recent news for ServiceNow is limited, with headlines primarily questioning if an expanding clientele will drive top-line growth. There are no specific imminent catalysts, such as earnings or regulatory actions, mentioned in the current headlines. Consequently, there is insufficient recent news to establish a clear directional trend.
